entries.note: V62-C reuses the shipped V62-A admission/ingress and shipped V62-B egress surfaces by default.
V62-C adds only one advisory connector hardening register over the exact admitted connector lineage.
V62-C derives advisory evidence from committed lane artifacts before narrative interpretation or review prose.
V62-C keeps one explicit frozen policy anchor as part of replayable advisory derivation.
V62-C carries positive rewitness basis or certificate posture only when it matches the selected upstream rewitness posture and fails closed otherwise.
V62-C keeps advisory outcomes non-entitling, non-escalating, and later-lock bound.
V62-C keeps the selected connector lineage path-level and non-generalizing by default.
